Studios and Labs

Design studios and classrooms of the Faculty of Art and Design are located in Block C.

Common spaces and laboratories that our students can use are:

STF Student Common Space and Exhibition Hall (C Block),

Art and Design Faculty Laboratory (LAB.4),

Digital Design and Production Laboratory (DDFL) (E Block),

Industrial Design Model Workshop (Block B),

DESIGNHUB-IST Design Education and Application Center (E Block).

Quick Search
